$comment: Known pre-existing references to db/migrations/_archive/ in executable command surfaces. These are tracked debt, NOT approved practice. The archive-execution guard reports each as a WARNING and does not fail the build for them; it FAILS for any reference not listed here. Do not add entries to silence a new violation -- remove the violation instead. Emptying this file (then deleting it) is a prerequisite for promoting the guard to enforcement mode. See docs/readiness/baseline-ci-plan.md.
